name: Burgess Jesus
description:
__Height:__ 355 cm (11'8")
__Affiliations:__ Blackbeard Pirates

Jesus Burgess, nicknamed "Champion", is the helmsman and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates, being captain of the First Ship.

He appears to be based off of Mexican wrestlers, as both his name and face mask are Spanish in origin. He is extremely strong, also shown to be quite level-minded and serious, as he berated Blackbeard for his easy-going attitude after the crew's failure to capture Luffy. He is the Helmsman of the Blackbeard Pirates.
